title: eragrostis invalida
intro: Eragrostis invalida, also known as Finger Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis invalida include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis invalida typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
